A HOUSE WAS DESTROYED. TREES AND POWER LINES WERE DOWNED.
CORRECTS PREVIOUS TORNADO REPORT. POSSIBLE TORNADO OR WIND INTENSITY UNKNOWN.
FROM SUNDAY 02/26/2023.
PICTURES ON SOCIAL MEDIA SHOW TREE DAMAGE AND WINDOWS BLOWN OUT OF THE BOWLING ALLEY IN SUBLETTE.

PROPERTY DAMAGE AT THIS LOCATION INCLUDES FLIPPED OVER 30-FOOT TRAILER, A 300-GALLON GAS TANK (HALF FULL) THAT ROLLED ABOUT 200 FEET, AND A LEAN-TO THAT BLEW APART. THERE WERE THREE NEARBY CENTER PIVOTS THAT WERE FLIPPED. THE PROPERTY OWNERS HAVE VIDEO OF BLACKOUT CONDITIONS DURING THE WIND EVENT FROM EXTENSIVE BLOWING DUST.
AWOS STATION K19S 1 NE SUBLETTE.
FROM THE KANSAS MESONET STATION SUBK1 (SUBLETTE 1E). THIS IS A 2 METER WIND GUST OBSERVATION.
